allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); print\('total:', d.get\('total'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), '| total:', d.get\('total'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['rows'][0] if d.get\('rows'\) else {}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), '| processing:', len\(d.get\('processing', []\)\), '| completed:', len\(d.get\('completed', []\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); print\('task:', d.get\('task'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), '| logs:', len\(d.get\('logs', []\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), '| rows:', len\(d.get\('rows', []\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\), '| error:', d.get\('error', ''\)\)")
